summary: Completed testing of Pet Life Pass features. All requested features verified: About page with team story (Mira, Dipali, Aditya), Membership renamed to 'Pet Life Pass' with correct pricing (₹4,999/year FIRST, ₹499/month), Admin Pet Parent Directory with Pet Soul view showing 8 pillars. 11/12 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: About page correctly displays team story with Mira (The Soul & Inspiration), Dipali (Keeper of the Concierge), and Aditya (Founder, The Doggy Bakery)
Hero section does NOT contain 'bakery' reference - shows 'Born from Love, Built for Every Pet Parent'
Pet Soul™ Technology section shows all 8 pillars: Identity, Family, Rhythm, Home, Travel, Taste, Training, Long Horizon
Membership page renamed to 'Pet Life Pass' with 'Founding Members' badge
Annual plan (₹4,999/year) displayed FIRST with 'FOUNDING MEMBER' badge - correct order
Monthly plan (₹499/month) displayed second with 'Get Started' button
Additional pets pricing: ₹2,499/year or ₹249/month each (+ GST)
Backend pricing calculation matches frontend (server.py line 6766-6771)
Frontend pricing calculation matches backend (MembershipOnboarding.jsx line 246-254)
Admin Pet Parent Directory shows Pet Soul view with all 8 pillars
Dipali has 3 pets: Mojo (36% soul), Mystique (0% soul), Luna (61% soul)
Soul enrichment from orders is implemented (server.py line 5791-5800)
save_soul_enrichment function in soul_intelligence.py saves to both doggy_soul_answers and soul_enrichments
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user dipali@clubconcierge.in
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Life Pass features fully functional. About page shows team story without bakery reference in hero. Membership page shows correct pricing with Annual plan FIRST. Admin Pet Parent Directory has beautiful Pet Soul Journey view with 8 pillars. Test user dipali@clubconcierge.in has 3 pets with varying soul completion levels.
